name: oh-my-agent-search
description: Installable starter for adding privacy-aware SearXNG search to Claude Code through MCP.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/install-claude-code.mjs && node --check scripts/self-test.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-searxng-local.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall-claude-code.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-searxng-json.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run self-test
